prompt: Quick log: I just removed the copper wire from branch R02 on ficus-benjamina-01. I applied it about 7 weeks ago to bring that branch down ~30°. The bend held — no rebound. There's a slight wire mark on the bark on the underside but no bite-in. The plant's been on the balcony in full morning sun, daytime temps around 27°C. Update the record and tell me what to check on next, and whether the wire impression will scar permanently or fade.

assertions.text: Does NOT initiate a sprawling Blender digital-twin session for what is a simple record update
Appends a wire_removed event to the plant record with date, evidence, and aftercare
Directly answers whether the wire impression will scar — fades on healthy bark without bite-in, with caveats
Recommends inspection cadence for the bend setting and bark recovery
Produces a calendar-ready reminder using the skill's reminder format
Stays scoped to what was asked (record + bark question + next checks); no generic care lecture
